description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with double button cuffs, patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket, shoulder flaps with buttoned closures, a small pocket on the left arm with a buttoned closure, a buttoned tab on the left hem, a concealed zipped pocket above the right hem and a curved hemFitindigo nation Edgy FitWash careHand wash or machine wash cold below 30 degrees using a mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring or bleachWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with chinos or denims and style it with understated accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
